docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF LAURA VALDIVIA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LAURA VALDIVIA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE AS REQUIRED BY CCP 116.340(C). NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $120.00 SERVED SEP-28-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, NANCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDIVIA, LAURA (CYCLIST) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, NANCY PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY WAS INCONSISTENT WITH THAT OF HER WITNESS. MOREOVER BASED ON THE TESTIMONY I AM PERSUADED THAT THE IMPACT HAPPENED AFTER DEFENDANT HAD MADE HER TURN. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVED DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT; THE DAMAGE TO DEFENDANT'S CAR IS CONSISTENT WITH HER TESTIMONY AND NOT WITH PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VALDIVIA, LAURA (CYCLIST) AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-12-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF LAURA VALDIVIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-14-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARED, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF LAURA VALDIVIA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT NANCY SMITH IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
